title: abelmoschus platydactylus
intro: Abelmoschus platydactylus, also known as the Okra-leaved Hibiscus or Five-fingered Hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Abelmoschus platydactylus include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
